message: Come meet fellow members and get an overview of our upcoming collaborative software projects! No experience required.
Join us for a hands-on workshop exploring blockchain applications in finance. No prior experience needed.
Dr. Chao will be discussing the future of deep learning and opportunities for student research.

clubName: The AutoDrive Challenge Team at The Ohio State University
message: Interested in autonomous vehicles? Come learn how to join our team and build the future of driving.
This week's meeting will cover matplotlib and seaborn. Bring your laptops!
Tryouts for new members will be held on Sunday at 10:00 AM at the baseball field near Woody Hayes Dr.
